metaInvariants.text: Pipeline stages execute in strictly sequential order: CTX → INT → PER → ENT → PRO → SYN → VER → GOV → BLD
Governor iteration is bounded at 3 maximum. The 4th invocation is a terminal REJECT.
MCP transport is stdio with JSON-RPC protocol. Ada never exposes REST or HTTP surfaces.
Gate failure recovery produces a structured GateFailurePayload — never a plain error string.
PreToolUse write-block hook ships as a static BootstrapSeed artifact checked into source control. Pipeline validates and extends it but never creates it from scratch.
Stages 1-4 (CTX, INT, PER, ENT) run at temperature 0 with structured output enforcement.
WHO entity (the governed operator) must be defined with role, scope, and trust level for ENT gate to pass.
ContinuousGovernor activates on every PreToolUse event, every 50 tokens of assistant output, and when drift score exceeds 0.3.
WorldModel persists across sessions via .ada/world-model.json. Session restore reads this file at SessionStart hook.
BLD stage performs partial regeneration: only artifacts whose blueprint postcode has changed are rewritten. Full regeneration is opt-in via --force.
